name: forensic-rag-mcp
instructions: Use this backend to semantically search the shared IR/DFIR knowledge corpus (Sigma, MITRE ATT&CK, Atomic Red Team, Splunk, KAPE, Velociraptor, LOLBAS, GTFOBins, and more). It is a derived/reference plane that provides grounding context only; it is NOT case evidence and holds no authority over cases, evidence seal, findings, or reports. Correlate retrieved knowledge with case artifacts before acting on it.

authority_contract.authority_disclaimer: This add-on is a derived/reference knowledge plane. It does not authorize cases, seal evidence, approve findings, approve reports, or bypass Gateway. All outputs are supporting context only.

tools.name: kb_search_knowledge
tools.description: Semantic search across the shared IR/DFIR knowledge corpus (Sigma, MITRE ATT&CK, Atomic Red Team, Splunk, KAPE, Velociraptor, LOLBAS, GTFOBins, and more). Supports source/source_ids/technique/platform filters and returns ranked, provenance-linked snippets.
tools.when_to_use: Use to ground analysis in forensic methodology, detection logic, or technique references; pass a MITRE technique id, source filter, or natural-language query.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid treating retrieved knowledge as case evidence or as attribution; it is supporting reference context only.
tools.output_notes: Returns provenance-linked, path-free knowledge snippets ordered by distance (lower is closer). Not case evidence.

tools.name: kb_list_knowledge_sources
tools.description: List the distinct knowledge source labels available in the corpus.
tools.when_to_use: Use to discover valid values for the source / source_ids filters of kb_search_knowledge.
tools.output_notes: Returns source labels only; not case evidence.

tools.name: kb_get_knowledge_stats
tools.description: Get knowledge corpus statistics (chunk/document/collection/source counts, embedding model) and confirm backend health.
tools.when_to_use: Use to confirm the knowledge backend is loaded and to size the corpus before relying on it.
tools.output_notes: Statistics and model contract only; not case evidence.
